title: Duro Shipwrights' Guild
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Duro Shipwrights' Guild''' built and operated the [[Duro Starshipwright Shipyards]], including [[Duro Delta Twelve]] and (in cooperation with [[FreiTek Incorporated/Legends|FreiTek, Inc]]) manufactured the [[Dagger-D police fighter]].

{{Company-stub}}
